title: Cuneiform Tablet #0207: Middle Assyrian Medical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a medical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a medical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Assyrian period. Medical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records medical matters typical of Middle Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
